series_metadata.series_description: Documents associated with the outsourcing of audits. Records may include, but are not limited to: the Request for Proposal (RFP) tracking sheet; the RFP document; pre-bid attendance sheet; technical and cost proposals submitted by the winning IPA firm; bid scoring sheets; Quality Assurance reports; documents related to the selection of the winning IPA firm; Memorandum of Agreement; documents related to any contract modifications; correspondence related to the IPA bidding process (letter of intent, client recommendation letter, award letter, related e-mails and any other related correspondence).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: while needed ; Electronic: from date contract is completed
